title: Automatically repair failed QA
brief: QA should complete automatically. If QA fails, return the task to Building and automatically relaunch the implementation agent with the QA failure evidence.
description: Close the autonomous build-QA-repair loop. QA agents already record pass/fail through board scripts. Observe a new failed-qa task version, transition it back to building, and launch the assigned implementation agent in the existing worktree so it can repair the failure. Guard duplicate watcher events and preserve Human Review for actual blockers or interrupted terminals.
acceptanceCriteria: The QA agent is instructed to finish by recording either pass or fail without user action.
A newly failed QA task automatically transitions back to building.
The assigned build agent automatically launches in the existing task worktree with access to QA notes and evidence.
Repeated watcher events cannot launch duplicate repair agents for the same failure version.
The UI describes failed QA as returning to build rather than offering a routine manual retry.
Pass QA still moves the task to Human Review and genuine interruptions still require human review.
qaChecklist: Fail QA with a specific reason and verify the task returns to building automatically.
Verify exactly one repair terminal launches for one failed task version.
Verify the repair agent prompt points to the durable task record containing QA notes.
Verify passing QA still moves to Human Review.
Verify typecheck, build, and tests pass.
designQaChecklist: Building state communicates that QA feedback is being repaired automatically.
No manual Retry QA control remains in the normal autonomous loop.
constraints: Build on TASK-006 automatic QA behavior.
Do not create an unbounded duplicate launch loop.
Do not overwrite unrelated main-checkout changes.
agentNotes: Follow-on to TASK-006; the reviewed automatic-QA commit was cherry-picked onto this branch. Implemented watcher-driven failed-qa handling that processes each failed task version once, saves the task back to building, and replaces the QA terminal with a build repair terminal. The repair prompt directs the agent to the latest QA notes/evidence and sends a successful repair through validation and automatic QA again. The UI removes manual Pass/Retry QA controls and describes the autonomous QA and repair states.

qaNotes.message: Verified QA pass/fail completion instructions, failed-version deduplication, transition back to building, safe QA-to-repair terminal replacement, repair prompt context, and full validation suite.

activityLog.message: Created follow-on task for autonomous QA failure repair.
Created worktree at /Users/bimpe/Documents/Experiments/agent board/.agent-board/worktrees/TASK-007 on new branch agent-board/TASK-007-automatically-repair-failed-qa.
Added automatic QA-failure transition to building, guarded repair-agent launch, repair-specific prompting, and autonomous status messaging. Local typecheck, build, and tests passed.
Started QA. Reusing existing worktree at /Users/bimpe/Documents/Experiments/agent board/.agent-board/worktrees/TASK-007 on branch agent-board/TASK-007-automatically-repair-failed-qa.
QA passed. Moved task to human-review.
